Apache 2.4.49.title: Apache path traversal vulnerability
Apache 2.4.49.description: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 is vulnerable to path traversal and file disclosure.
Apache 2.4.49.fix: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to 2.4.51 or later.

Apache 2.4.50.title: Apache remote code execution vulnerability
Apache 2.4.50.description: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.50 can be exploited for remote code execution in certain configurations.
Apache 2.4.50.fix: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server to 2.4.51 or later.

nginx 1.18.0.title: Nginx resolver off-by-one memory overwrite
nginx 1.18.0.description: Certain nginx builds with resolver enabled are vulnerable to memory corruption.
nginx 1.18.0.fix: Upgrade nginx to a patched stable release.

OpenSSH 7.2.title: OpenSSH roaming information leak
OpenSSH 7.2.description: Older OpenSSH clients with roaming enabled can leak sensitive memory contents.
OpenSSH 7.2.fix: Upgrade OpenSSH and disable roaming on affected clients.
